_comment: Line-count RATCHET (see cssStructure.test.js). buttons.css and containers.css were fully drained into resources/css/components/ (2026-07); only app.css (the shared base entry) remains ratcheted so new styles go into components/<feature>.css instead of accreting here. Counts may only go DOWN; the test prints the new number when you shrink a file — copy it in. Raising a number is a conscious, reviewed exception.
